---
title: "Memoir of Bishop Mackenzie. (Author not named)"
---

## Memoir of Bishop Mackenzie. (Author not named)

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1864
**Genre:** Non-fiction: biography
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Christian Remembrancer</i> Vol 47. pp. 401-426

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
